title: [LLHD][Arc] Indexing and slicing lowering from Verilog to LLVM IR

features.name: always_ff with non-blocking assignments to indexed packed array bits
features.description: Code should include an always_ff procedural block with non-blocking assignments to individually indexed bits of a packed array output

features.name: packed array output with bit-select assignments in procedural block
features.description: Code should include an output logic packed array where separate bit-select assignments occur within a clocked procedural block
